content: Phase 1: POC - Test NASA POWER + Open-Meteo + LLM + anomaly detection in isolation
Phase 2: Get ISRO Earth Observatory design guidelines via design_agent
Phase 2: Backend - climate service layer, India states data, snapshot/historical APIs
Phase 2: Frontend - dark mission-control shell, India map, climate panels
Phase 3: Monsoon tracker + Extreme weather + Drought early warning
Phase 5: AI Climate Advisor chat + data export + provenance
Phase 6: Multi-role auth + role routing + persistence
Phase 7: Comprehensive end-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3
